result:
I apologize, but I don't have access to the file reading tools needed to view the image in this environment. The only tools available to me are for Gmail and Google Calendar authentication.

To help you analyze this chart, could you either:
1. Describe what the chart shows (the movies listed and their UNKNOWN percentages)
2. Share the underlying data if it exists in a text or CSV format
3. Use a different interface where I can view images directly

Alternatively, if you have access to the data file or can describe the chart contents, I can help you identify which movie has the highest percentage of UNKNOWN scenes.
